Cedric & Karen — November 7, 2026

November 7, 2026

Hacienda Solange Alfonso, Alfonso, Cavite

Where we're saying "I do"

Hacienda Solange Alfonso

Nestled in Alfonso, Cavite — a garden estate with tree-lined grounds and covered venues that carry the celebration from ceremony to reception.

Address

047 Aguinaldo-Alfonso Rd., Brgy. Esperanza Ilaya, Alfonso, Cavite 4123, Philippines

Parking

Complimentary parking is available inside the venue. Attendants will guide you upon arrival.

Take me there Places to stay

Approximately 3 hours from Metro Manila

Dress code

Come dressed

Principal and Secondary Sponsors

Gentlemen

Traditional Barong Tagalog drawn from a warm, understated palette — cream and almond.

Ladies

From the soft stillness of sage and dusty sage to the deep, grounded richness of moss and forest green.

Almond
Sage

Moss
Forest Green

All guests

Gentlemen

Formal attire in a palette as warm and unhurried as the earth itself — cream, almond, tan, and brown.

Ladies

From the delicate softness of cream and almond to the grounded richness of tan and brown.

Almond
Tan

our favorite moments

Before the big day

forever starts here

us, always

love & laughter

our favorite place

The schedule

How the day unfolds

3:00 PM

The vows

Join us as we exchange our vows surrounded by the ones we love most. A moment of promises, unity, and the beginning of forever.

4:00 PM

Golden hour drinks

Enjoy refreshing drinks and light appetizers while mingling with fellow guests in the garden as the golden hour sets in.

5:30 PM

Sit down & celebrate

A celebration of love with heartfelt toasts, a curated dinner, and stories shared over candlelit tables under the stars.

7:30 PM – Late

Keep the night going

The night is young and the dance floor awaits. Let loose, celebrate, and make memories that will last a lifetime.

Where to stay

Stay a while

We've curated a selection of wonderful places to stay near the venue. Book early to secure your preferred choice.

The Lake Hotel

5 minutes from venue

Luxury lakeside hotel with stunning Taal views, spa facilities, and fine dining. Perfect for a relaxing stay.

View website →

Wingate Manor

10 minutes from venue

Charming boutique hotel with cozy rooms, beautiful gardens, and a warm atmosphere.

View website →

Twin Lakes Hotel

15 minutes from venue

Modern resort with golf course access, multiple dining options, and spacious accommodations.

View website →

Join us

RSVP

Please confirm your attendance before October 1, 2026.

If you'd like to give

Your presence at our celebration is the greatest gift we could ask for. But if you wish to bless our new beginning...
